name: smart-hire-web
description: Smart Hire — Crisp Modern SaaS design handoff rebuilt in HTML + Tailwind + SCSS + JS

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:eleventy && npm run build:sass && npm run build:tailwind
scripts.dev: npm run build:eleventy && npm run build:sass && npm run build:tailwind && concurrently -k -n eleventy,sass,tailwind -c blue,magenta,green "npm:watch:eleventy" "npm:watch:sass" "npm:watch:tailwind"
